{{Quote|Hmm… A party!|A member of the tree species, after reading a poster handed out by Wicket Wystri Warrick|<ref name="PE" />}}
A [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Sentience/Legends|sapient]] of '''talking trees''' were found on the forest [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]].

==Appearance and biology==
A [[Species/Legends|species]] of animate [[Tree/Legends|trees]] exhibited both [[Sentience/Legends|sentience]] and the ability to speak. Like ordinary trees, the beings rooted themselves into the ground and spread their [[Plant|leaf]]-bearing [[Limb/Legends|branches]] upward,<ref name="PE" /> making them tower over two [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in height.<ref name="height" /> Unlike mundane trees, however, the talking variety were able to use their branches as fine manipulators, grasping and using tools, for instance. Members of the species had two large, teardrop-shaped [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and a large [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]] on one side of the trunk. A long, red tongue lay inside the mouth, facilitating the facility of speech. Lids covered the eyes, blinking intermittently. The eyes of at least some of the talking trees were [[Color/Legends|brown]] in color, as was their bark. Their leaves were green. With eyes and mouth closed, a member of the species easily passed for an ordinary tree.<ref name="PE" />

==Society and culture==
Talking trees spent at least part of their [[Time/Legends|time]] with eyes and mouth closed, causing them to blend into their arboreal surroundings. They were capable of speaking at least one [[Language/Legends|language]] found on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon]] of [[Endor (planet)/Legends|Endor]].<ref name="PE" />

==History==
{{Quote|By the time we're through with these posters, everyone on Endor will know about the party. Right, Baga?|Wicket Wystri Warrick|<ref name="PE" />}}
At least one member of the [[Species/Legends|species]] lived on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon]] of [[Endor (planet)/Legends|Endor]], where the individual had put down roots near the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[City/Legends|settlement]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]]<ref name="PE" /> by [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].<ref name="BTM">''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]''</ref> The talking tree was well-disposed to the Ewoks neighbors. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Bright Tree's [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]] was tasked by her [[Parent/Legends|father]], [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]], with throwing a party in honor of a visiting dignitary known as Prince [[Delby]]. To help Kintaka with the preparations, the Ewok [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] led the [[Bordok/Legends|bordok]] [[Baga]] throughout the forest and distributed posters—large leaves with information about the event scribbled onto them—from Baga's saddlebags. Warrick affixed one announcements to the face of the talking tree who lived in the vicinity. With eyes and mouth closed, the sentient being resembled a mundane tree. The talking tree stirred, removed the poster, and responded favorably to the invitation to the party.<ref name="PE" />

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|Party Ewok}} {{1st}}
